Purpose: Equality before law and equal protection.
Prohibits discrimination including sex.
Right to life and dignity.
Prohibits human trafficking.
Equal pay for equal work.
Humane working conditions and maternity relief.

Law / Section: Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act
Purpose: Protects women from domestic abuse.
Prohibits dowry demand.

Law / Section: Sexual Harassment of Women at Workplace Act
Purpose: Prevents sexual harassment at workplace.
Provides maternity leave benefits.
Prohibits indecent depiction of women.
Establishes NCW.

Law / Section: Pre-Conception and Pre-Natal Diagnostic Techniques Act
Purpose: Prevents gender selection.

Law / Section: Muslim Women Protection of Rights on Marriage Act
Purpose: Criminalizes triple talaq.
Protection of children from sexual offences.
Care and protection of children.
Prevents child labour.
Free education for children.
Prevents child marriages.
Cyber crime law.
Protects digital personal data.
Marriage law for Hindus.
Civil marriage law.
Property rights.
Adoption and maintenance.
